original_nl_question: Provide the names and birthplaces of individuals who both acted in and directed a movie.
original_gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:hasCastMember]-(m0:Movie),(n:Person)<-[r1:directedBy]-(m0:Movie) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.place_of_birth
corrupted_nl_question: Provide the name and birth detail of an individual who both acted in and directed a movie.

original_nl_question: Who are the individuals who wrote Rocky V and were cast members in Men in Black, and what are their dates of death?

original_nl_question: How many individuals either directed Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith or wrote Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones?
original_gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Person)<-[r0:directedBy]-(m0:Movie {name: 'Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Person)<-[r1:writtenBy]-(m1:Movie {name: 'Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
